chain.thought: Explanation: Interpreting "goal-role" as forwards (FW) and "non-goal-role" as midfielders (MF) or goalkeepers (GK), we look for footballers who won awards in both categories across different seasons. The only repeat winners are Itumeleng Khune (GK in both his seasons) and Siyabonga Nomvethe (FW in both his seasons). No player appears with different positions across seasons, so none are both goal-role and non-goal-role.

- Non-GK winners: all others (FW or MF)
No player appears as both GK and a non-GK in different seasons. Therefore, the count of award winners who were goal-role and non-goal-role is 0, matching the Prediction Answer.
